{{Infobox religious building

| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
| deity = {{ill|Shitateruhime|lt=Shitateruhime|fr|Shitateruhime|ja|シタテルヒメ|simple|Shitateru-hime|zh|下照姬|qid=Q11307233|1=Shitateruhime}}
}}

{{nihongo|'''Hime Shrine (Nanto City)'''|比賣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Etchū Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}

[[JA:比賣神社 (南砺市)]]

{{wikidata link|Q43594869}}

== Japanese content ==
{{神社
|名称   = Hime Shrine
|画像   = {{画像募集中|cat=南砺市}}
|所在地 = {{ill|lt=Toyama Prefecture|Q132929|qid=Q132929|1=Toyama Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nanto|Q646805|qid=Q646805|1=Nanto, Toyama}} Takamiya 482
|位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}}
|祭神   = {{ill|lt=Shitateruhime|Q11307233|qid=Q11307233|lt=Shitateruhime no Mikoto|1=Shitateruhime}}
|社格   = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}（small）
|創建   = unknown (burned in Uesugi Kenshin's Etchū campaign, later rebuilt)
|本殿   = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}}
|別名   = 
|例祭   = {{ill|lt=November 2|Q2996|qid=Q2996|1=November 2}}
|神事   = 
|地図 = {{Location map|Japan Toyama|label=比賣神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}}
}}
'''Hime Shrine''' (ひめじんじゃ, also read ひめのじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Takamiya, {{ill|lt=Nanto|Q646805|qid=Q646805|1=Nanto, Toyama}}, {{ill|lt=Toyama Prefecture|Q132929|qid=Q132929|1=Toyama Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}, one of the seven Tonami shrines in {{ill|lt=Etchū Province|Q906899|qid=Q906899|1=Etchū Province}}.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined in the southwestern part of {{ill|lt=Toyama Prefecture|Q132929|qid=Q132929|1=Toyama Prefecture}}, south of {{ill|lt=Nanto|Q646805|qid=Q646805|1=Nanto, Toyama}}.

Under the {{ill|lt=ritsuryō system|Q742460|qid=Q742460|1=Ritsuryō}}, it was one of the Tonami seven shrines of {{ill|lt=Etchū Province|Q906899|qid=Q906899|1=Etchū Province}}. The other shrines are {{ill|lt=Takase Shrine|Q3791906|qid=Q3791906|1=Takase Shrine (Nanto)}}, {{ill|lt=Hayashi Shrine|Q11533248|qid=Q11533248|1=Hayashi Shrine}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Nagaoka Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Aranami Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|lt=Ogami Shrine|Q11659236|qid=Q11659236|1=Ogami Shrine (disambiguation)}}.

During the {{ill|lt=Sengoku period (Japan)|Q204023|qid=Q204023|lt=Sengoku period|1=Sengoku period}}, it fell into ruin in warfare during Uesugi Kenshin's Etchū campaign, but local notables lamented the loss of the historic site, collected materials, and rebuilt it.

=== Related articles ===
* {{ill|lt=Imizu Shrine|Q11458557|qid=Q11458557|1=Imizu Shrine}}
* {{ill|lt=Keta Shrine|Q11548073|qid=Q11548073|1=Keta Shrine}}
* {{ill|lt=Oyama Shrine|Q11659204|qid=Q11659204|1=Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)}}
